## Description

Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Performance

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo check --workspace` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace` has no warnings
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` applied
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
